title: 菊花賞の後に・三冠達成

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Three crowns claimed. Symboli Rudolf basks in
the crowd's applause as she holds three fingers
high. Next up: the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, Narita Brian, who was watching the
race, comes by the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their terse conversation ends with some pointed
remarks from Brian about Rudolf's insistence on
keeping up her student council duties.
